data.keyword: Who offers in-home therapy or community-based mental health support in Louisville?
data.tag: lmhg ai mode expanded Who offers in-home therapy or community-based mental health support in Louisvill

result.keyword: Who offers in-home therapy or community-based mental health support in Louisville?

items.markdown:
Several organizations provide community-based, in-home, or specialized mental health support in Louisville, KY, focusing on accessible care, counseling, and specialized services.[[1]](https://counselingnow.com/ky-local-counseling/top-counseling-in-louisville/)[[2]](https://www.causeiq.com/directory/mental-health-group-homes-list/louisvillejefferson-county-ky-in-metro/)[[3]](https://kentuckycounselingcenter.com/psychiatrist-louisville-ky/)[[4]](https://robertalexandercenter.com/situational-depression-symptoms-and-treatment-in-louisville/)

- **[Louisville Center for Therapy and Personal Sustainability (LCTPS)](http://www.lctps.org/):** Offers community-based music therapy to the Louisville Metro area, focusing on wellness and therapeutic services for individuals, including LGBTQ-affirming care.[[1]](https://www.google.com/searchviewer/10?svid=CAwSHRIbCgNwdnESFENnMHZaeTh4TVdvemFEbDROekI1GAo)[[2]](https://www.lctps.org/)[[3]](https://www.lctps.org/music-therapy-internship)
- **[Wellspring](https://wellspringky.org/):** Provides community-based services, including Assertive Community Treatment (ACT), supported employment, and crisis services, often serving individuals in their own housing environment.[[1]](https://www.google.com/searchviewer/10?svid=CAwSGxIZCgNwdnESEkNnc3ZaeTh4ZEdaeWMyNTBaZxgK)[[2]](https://wellspringky.org/who-we-are-2/)[[3]](https://wellspringky.org/intensive-treatment-teams/)[[4]](https://wellspringky.org/supported-employment/)[[5]](https://www.wlky.com/article/louisville-mental-health-support-give-wellspring/65878546)
- **[NAMI Louisville](http://www.namilouisville.org/):** Offers community-based education, support groups, and resources for individuals with mental illness and their families, aimed at reducing stigma.[[1]](https://www.google.com/searchviewer/10?svid=CAwSGxIZCgNwdnESEkNnc3ZaeTh4ZEdSc05uYzRhZxgK)[[2]](https://namilouisville.org/)[[3]](https://namilouisville.org/programs-%26-classes)[[4]](https://www.instagram.com/namilouisville/)[[5]](https://namilouisville.org/about-us)
- **[CompServ Health Resources Inc.](https://www.compservhealth.com/):** Provides counseling and therapeutic services, including Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT) and individual/group options.[[1]](https://www.compservhealth.com/booking-calendar/psychotherapy-1?utm_source=google&utm_medium=book_button&utm_campaign=Psychotherapy)
- **[Louisville Mind and Wellness LLC](https://louisvillemindandwellness.com/):** Offers mental health services and family practice, located on Baxter Ave.[[1]](https://www.tebra.com/care/practice/louisville-mind-and-wellness-llc-650686?lid=490335590)

These providers focus on community-based support to enhance personal sustainability, crisis management, and accessibility to care.[[1]](https://bridgesupport.org/making-a-difference-community-link-workers/)[[2]](https://www.kidsfirstservices.com/first-insights/community-therapy-programs)[[3]](https://restaurabh.com/areas-we-serve/)

Would you like to find services specifically for children, seniors, or a particular condition like addiction or trauma?

Wellspring : Provides community-based services, including Assertive Community Treatment (ACT), supported employment, and crisis services, often serving individuals in their own housing environment.
